name: Baked Chicken and Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil in a Dutch oven.
2. Add the bouillon cubes and stir until dissolved.
3. Mix the butter or margarine with the rice, onion, green pepper, and celery.
4. Season the chicken pieces with seasoning salt.
5. Place the seasoned chicken on top of the rice mixture in the Dutch oven.
6. Cook for 1 1/2 hours at 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
